sub_goals.description: src/easterEgg/twoSevenOff.js (overlay component + Firestore listener + ANIMATION_TOTAL_MS=5000) + styles/animations.css (keyframes)
Integration glue: action-clock pause visual + table-view dim during overlay

verification_summary: S6.A1-A5 verified. Overlay renders full-viewport (position fixed, inset 0, z-index 99999); ANIMATION_TOTAL_MS = 5000 (within 4000-6000 bound); no holder identity referenced in overlay DOM; intentionally breaks OttoBLD palette with neon magenta/cyan/electric-yellow bursts; action-clock visual reflects is_paused state.
